howItWorks.title: From Photo to Published Book
howItWorks.subtitle: No design skills needed. No waiting weeks. Just pure personalised magic.
howItWorks.ctaSub: No credit card required to start

1.title: Upload a Photo
1.description: Upload any clear photo of your child's face. Our AI recognises and illustrates their real features into every page.

2.title: Choose the Adventure
2.description: Pick a dream job, story theme, and personalise with their best friend's name, pet, favourite colour — every detail woven in.

3.title: AI Creates the Magic
3.description: Claude AI writes a unique 32-page story. Replicate AI illustrates your child as the hero on every single page. 100% original.

4.title: Receive the Magic
4.description: Download instantly as a PDF, or receive a printed hardcover at your door — optionally narrated in your own cloned voice.

pricing.title: Choose Your
pricing.subtitle: Every tier includes a 100% unique AI-written story with your child's real face illustrated throughout.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.readyDesc: Your child's adventure is waiting. It takes 5 minutes to set up and 15 minutes to generate. Start free today.
faq.readyFooter: No credit card required · Preview before you pay · Full refund guarantee

items.q: How is my child illustrated into every page?
items.a: We use IP-Adapter technology combined with Stable Diffusion XL (via Replicate). You upload one clear photo of your child's face. The AI extracts their facial features — eye colour, face shape, hair — and consistently illustrates them as the hero throughout all 32 pages in your chosen art style.

items.q: How does the voice cloning work? Is it safe?
items.a: You record just 30 seconds of yourself speaking naturally. ElevenLabs — the world leader in voice AI — creates a professional clone of your voice for all 32 pages of narration. The clone is stored only on your account and is never shared.

items.q: How long does it take to generate a book?
items.a: Story generation takes about 30 seconds. Image generation (32 pages) takes 8–15 minutes. Voice (if ordered) takes another 5–10 minutes. You'll receive an email the moment your book is ready.
Every single book is 100% unique. Claude AI generates a completely new story each time using the child's specific name, age, job, theme, best friend, pet, culture, and more.

items.q: What photo quality do I need?
items.a: Any recent, clear photo where the child's face is visible and well-lit works well. The face should ideally take up at least 30% of the photo. A normal smartphone portrait photo is perfect.

items.q: How is the printed book delivered?
items.a: Printed books are fulfilled by Gelato, our global print-on-demand partner with printing facilities in 32 countries. 5–7 business days standard, 2–3 days rush. Arrives in a premium gift-ready box.

items.q: Can I order in a language other than English?
items.a: Yes — we support 50+ languages. The story is generated directly in your chosen language by Claude's multilingual model.

items.q: Can I preview the book before paying?
items.a: Yes. After the AI generates your book, you can preview all 32 pages before choosing your tier and completing payment. You only pay once you love what you see.
Digital books: full refund within 24 hours if you haven't downloaded the file. Printed books: full reprint or refund if the print quality is damaged. We stand fully behind every book we create.
